brand_identity.name: Fairygarden For You
brand_identity.tagline: A Touch of Magic in a Bottle
brand_identity.aesthetic: Dark Enchanted Forest with Gold Accents
brand_identity.target_audience: Gift buyers, plant enthusiasts, fantasy lovers

rules.headings: Use 'Cinzel Decorative' for H1-H3. Tracking wide. Gold or Cream color.
rules.body: Use 'Montserrat' for readability. High contrast required.

sections.hero: Full viewport height (100vh), centered content, parallax background.
sections.gallery: Bento Grid or 3-column masonry. Glassmorphic cards.

primary.custom_css: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #d4af37 0%, #8b7620 100%); box-shadow: inset 2px 2px 4px rgba(255,255,255,0.4), inset -2px -2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); color: #3e2b08; font-weight: bold; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 9999px;

secondary.css_classes: border-2 border-[#c9a84c] text-[#c9a84c] hover:bg-[#c9a84c] hover:text-[#1a3320] transition-colors rounded-full px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-wider

cards.product: Glassmorphism: bg-[#1a3320]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-[#c9a84c]/30 rounded-xl hover:border-[#c9a84c] transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-2 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(201,168,76,0.2)]
cards.blog: Solid Cream card with Dark Green text (if in light section) or Glassmorphism (if in dark section).

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border border-[#c9a84c]/40 text-cream placeholder:text-cream/50 focus:border-[#c9a84c] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#c9a84c] rounded-md

animations.sparkles: Use 'react-tsparticles' with 'fireworks' or custom gold dust config.
animations.fairies: Floating animation (framer-motion) for small glowing orbs/fairy assets.

assets.icons: Use Lucide React (Wand, Sprout, ShoppingCart, Star, Sparkles)

universal_guidelines: No transparent backgrounds for dropdowns or floating elements (use glassmorphism).
Ensure text contrast meets WCAG AA (Gold text on Dark Green needs care - use lighter gold #f0e68c for small text).
Do NOT use standard HTML inputs; use styled Shadcn components.
Implement a 'Cart Overlay' (Sheet/Drawer) rather than a separate page for smoother UX.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Install dependencies: 'yarn add framer-motion react-tsparticles tsparticles-slim lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge'.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Setup Tailwind Config: Add the custom colors (forest green, gold, cream) and fonts.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create the 'GoldButton' component first - it is the signature element.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Build the layout sections strictly following the Dark/Light alternation.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Implement the 'Sparkles' background wrapper using react-tsparticles.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Ensure the 'Shop' functionality uses a simple context-based cart system.
